message:
fix(profile_sweep,paragraph): extract pipeline metrics helper; skip wrap logic for WrapMode::None

Extract pipeline-specific JSON metrics into pipeline_metrics_json() and
conditionally emit pipeline stats in human-readable output only when
render mode is Pipeline. Fix Paragraph::measure to treat WrapMode::None
the same as no-wrap, preserving natural text width.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
